1.gl: Asaph, the name of three Israelites, and of the family of the first
properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: to scratch, i.e. (by implication) to engrave, plough; hence (from the use of tools) to fabricate (of any material); figuratively, to devise (in a bad sense); hence (from the idea of secrecy) to be silent, to let alone; h
2.kj: [idiom] altogether, cease, conceal, be deaf, devise, ear, graven, imagine, leave off speaking, hold peace, plow(-er, man), be quiet, rest, practise secretly, keep silence, be silen

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
2.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

2.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
2.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.
appease, idleness, (at, be at, be in, give) quiet(-ness), (be at, be in, give, have, take) rest, settle, be still.

3.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
3.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

3.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
3.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
3.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

3.gl: to make a loud sound (like English 'hum'); by implication, to be in great commotion or tumult, to rage, war, moan, clamor
3.kj: clamorous, concourse, cry aloud, be disquieted, loud, mourn, be moved, make a noise, rage, roar, sound, be troubled, make in tumult, tumultuous, be in an uproar.

3.dv: or (fully) אוֹיֵב; active participle of H340 (אָיַב);

4.gl: to hide (by covering over); by implication, to hoard or reserve; figuratively to deny; specifically (favorably) to protect, (unfavorably) to lurk
4.kj: esteem, hide(-den one, self), lay up, lurk (be set) privily, (keep) secret(-ly, place).

4.gl: properly, to be (or make) bare; but used only in the derivative sense (through the idea perhaps of smoothness) to be cunning (usually in a bad sense)
4.kj: [idiom] very, beware, take crafty (counsel), be prudent, deal subtilly.

4.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
to advise; reflexively, to deliberate or resolve
4.kj: advertise, take advise, advise (well), consult, (give, take) counsel(-lor), determine, devise, guide, purpose.

4.gl: a session, i.e. company of persons (in close deliberation); by implication, intimacy, consultation, a secret

5.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

5.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
5.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

5.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
5.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
5.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

5.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
5.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

5.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
5.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

5.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
5.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

6.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
6.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

6.gl: to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces)
6.kj: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wan

6.gl: a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh)
6.dv: from H1262 (בָּרָה) (in the sense of cutting (like H1254 (בָּרָא)));

6.gl: to advise; reflexively, to deliberate or resolve
6.kj: advertise, take advise, advise (well), consult, (give, take) counsel(-lor), determine, devise, guide, purpose.
alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

7.gl: a Hagrite or member of a certain Arabian clan
7.dv: or (prolonged) הַגְרִיאxlit Hagrîʼ corrected to Hagrîyʼ; perhaps patronymically from H1904 (הָגָר);

7.gl: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
7.dv: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father;

7.gl: Edom, the elder twin-brother of Jacob; hence the region (Idumaea) occupied by him
7.dv: or (fully) אֱדוֹם ; from H122 (אָדֹם); red (see Genesis 25:25);

7.gl: a tent (as clearly conspicuous from a distance)
a Jishmaelite or descendant of Jishmael

8.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
8.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

8.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
8.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

8.gl: Ammon, a son of Lot; also his posterity and their country
Amalek, a descendant of Esau; also his posterity and their country

8.dv: or צוֹר; the same as H6864 (צֹר); a rock;

9.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
9.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

9.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
9.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

9.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
9.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

9.gl: Ashshur, the second son of Shem; also his descendants and the country occupied by them (i.e. Assyria), its region and its empire
9.kj: Asshur, Assur, Assyria, Assyrians. See H838 (אָשֻׁר).
9.dv: or אַשֻּׁר; apparently from H833 (אָשַׁר) (in the sense of successful);

9.gl: the arm (as stretched out), or (of animals) the foreleg; figuratively, force
9.kj: arm, [phrase] help, mighty, power, shoulder, strength.
9.dv: or (shortened) זְרֹעַ; and (feminine) זְרוֹעָה; or זְרֹעָה; from H2232 (זָרַע);

9.gl: properly, to twine, i.e. (by implication) to unite, to remain; also to borrow (as a form of obligation) or (caus.) to lend
9.kj: abide with, borrow(-er), cleave, join (self), lend(-er).

10.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
10.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

10.gl: a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine)
10.dv: or (feminine) נַחְלָה; (Psalm 124:4), or נַחֲלָה; (Ezekiel 47:19; Ezekiel 48:28), from H5157 (נָחַל) in its original sense;

10.gl: Midjan, a son of Abraham; also his country and (collectively) his descendants
Sisera, the name of a Canaanitish king and of one of the Nethinim
Jabin, the name of two Canaanitish kings

11.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
11.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

11.dv: or עֵין דּוֹר; or עֵין־דֹּר; from H5869 (עַיִן) and H1755 (דּוֹר); fountain of dwelling;

11.kj: destory(-uction), bring to nought, overthrow, perish, pluck down, [idiom] utterly.

12.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
12.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

12.gl: properly, voluntary, i.e. generous; hence, magnanimous; as noun, a grandee (sometimes a tyrant)
properly, something poured out, i.e. a libation; also a molten image; by implication, a prince (as anointed)
Oreb, the name of a Midianite and of the cliff near the Jordan
12.dv: or עוֹרֵב; the same as H6158 (עֹרֵב);
from H6738 (צֵל) and H4513 (מָנַע); shade has been denied;

13.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

13.gl: to occupy (by driving out previous tenants, and possessing in their place); by implication, to seize, to rob, to inherit; also to expel, to impoverish, to ruin
13.kj: cast out, consume, destroy, disinherit, dispossess, drive(-ing) out, enjoy, expel, [idiom] without fail, (give to, leave for) inherit(-ance, -or) [phrase] magistrate, be (make) poo

13.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
13.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

14.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
14.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
14.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

14.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
14.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

14.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
14.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

14.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
14.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

14.gl: a wheel; by analogy, a whirlwind; also dust (as whirled)

15.gl: to kindle, i.e. consume (by fire or by eating);  to be(-come) brutish
15.kj: be brutish, bring (put, take) away, burn, (cause to) eat (up), feed, heat, kindle, set (on fire), waste.
15.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H1198 (בַּעַר)

15.gl: a copse of bushes; hence, a forest; hence, honey in the comb (as hived in trees)
15.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to thicken with verdure;

15.gl: {a flash; figuratively, a sharply polished blade or point of aweapon}
15.dv: or לַהֶבֶת; feminine of H3851 (לַהַב), and meaning the same

15.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)
properly, to lick, i.e. (by implication) to blaze
15.kj: burn (up), set on fire, flaming, kindle.

16.gl: to tremble inwardly (or palpitate), i.e. (figuratively) be (causative, make) (suddenly) alarmed or agitated; by implication to hasten anxiously
16.kj: be (make) affrighted (afraid, amazed, dismayed, rash), (be, get, make) haste(-n, -y, -ily), (give) speedy(-ily), thrust out, trouble, vex.

16.gl: to run after (usually with hostile intent; figuratively (of time) gone by)
16.kj: chase, put to flight, follow (after, on), hunt, (be under) persecute(-ion, -or), pursue(-r).
Red Sea, storm, tempest, whirlwind, Red sea.

17.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
17.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
17.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

17.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
17.kj: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness

17.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
17.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

17.gl: to search out (by any method, specifically in worship or prayer); by implication, to strive after
17.kj: ask, beg, beseech, desire, enquire, get, make inquisition, procure, (make) request, require, seek (for).

17.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
17.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

18.gl: to tremble inwardly (or palpitate), i.e. (figuratively) be (causative, make) (suddenly) alarmed or agitated; by implication to hasten anxiously
18.kj: be (make) affrighted (afraid, amazed, dismayed, rash), (be, get, make) haste(-n, -y, -ily), (give) speedy(-ily), thrust out, trouble, vex.

18.gl: properly, to wander away, i.e. lose oneself; by implication to perish (causative, destroy)
18.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

18.gl: to blush; figuratively, to be ashamed, disappointed; causatively, to shame, reproach
18.kj: be ashamed, be confounded, be brought to confusion (unto shame), come (be put to) shame, bring reproach.
18.dv: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H2658 (חָפַר) through the idea of detection);

18.gl: properly, a (peremptory) terminus, i.e. (by implication) duration, in the sense of advance or perpetuity (substantially as a noun, either with or without a preposition)
18.kj: eternity, ever(-lasting, -more), old, perpetually, [phrase] world without end.

18.gl: properly, to pale, i.e. by implication to be ashamed; also (by implication) to be disappointed or delayed
18.kj: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.
